query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_pricing.pricing_product_sku_mappings
                (id, product_id, product_variant_id, sku_id,
                 quantity_expression, status, metadata,
                 created_at, updated_at)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                quantity_expression = VALUES(quantity_expression),
                status = VALUES(status),
                metadata = VALUES(metadata),
                updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
